Description: Default operating point at baseline bias ($V_{\text{bias}} \approx 0.8$ V, $\Psi_p = 1.37724$).
Operating regime under slightly higher bias ($V_{\text{bias}} \approx 0.81$ V, $\Psi_p = 1.38724$).
Lasing under reduced material thermal conductivity (cladding reduced to $0.58$, MQW reduced to $0.025$), verifying temperature feedback.
Lasing under high Auger recombination loss ($C_n = C_p = 4.5\times 10^{-29}\text{ cm}^6/\text{s}$), testing heavy loss stability.
Lasing under high electron and hole mobilities (cladding increased to $2000/500$, MQW to $700/180$), validating drift-diffusion advection-dominated limits.
